title: A2UI Studio configuration
description: Workspace configuration for the A2UI Studio VS Code extension. Commit this file to share provider profiles and generation settings with your team.

defaultProfile.description: Name of the profile activated by default when this workspace opens.

autoRepair.description: When the model emits invalid A2UI messages, automatically send one corrective follow-up turn. Overrides the VS Code setting.

systemPromptAppend.description: Extra instructions appended to the A2UI system prompt (e.g. brand voice, design rules, preferred theme colors).

ollamaUrl.description: Base URL of the Ollama server. Overrides the VS Code setting.

baseUrls.description: Per-provider gateway base URLs (AWS/LiteLLM-style proxies). Model lists are fetched from these URLs; API keys become optional.

catalog.description: Custom component catalog for this workspace. The agent is instructed to use only these components; unknown components render as labeled placeholders in the studio.

id.description: Catalog identifier the agent should put in createSurface.catalogId. Defaults to the catalog file's catalogId/$id.

path.description: Path to the catalog JSON file, relative to this config file.

profiles.description: Named provider/model presets selectable from the A2UI Studio UI.

name.description: Unique display name for this profile.

description.description: Optional short description shown in the Settings view.

provider.description: AI provider used by this profile.

model.description: Model ID. Leave empty for the provider default.

baseUrl.description: Custom API base URL (enterprise gateways / proxies). Applies to anthropic, openai, gemini and ollama providers.
